author_identification.canonical_name_ar: عبد الرحمن بن يحيى المُعَلِّمي اليماني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent scholar in tafsir and Arabic grammar, known for his meticulous analysis and contributions to Islamic sciences.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A specialized treatise on the grammatical analysis of a specific Quranic verse, reflecting the author's expertise in both tafsir and nahw.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the collected works of al-Mu'allimi, highlighting his contributions to Quranic exegesis and Arabic grammar.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Muhammad Ajmal al-Islahi is a respected editor known for his careful and scholarly approach to textual investigation.
